description: Originally launched on Ethereum in Q4 2023, Memecoin (MEME) is a pure memecoin not only for Memeland, but also for the entire Web3 space. Now as a 1:1 price-indexing token on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 MEME gives original MEME holders, users and traders instant finality, ultra-low fees, and AI contract capability for faster, more secure, and more scalable meme cultures worldwide.
name: Memecoin
